events.fact: Character 'Conrad' is created with a red mustache and hair.
A new world named 'Terra Conrad' is generated using a random seed.
A Valkyrie carries the character into the Meadows biome of Valheim.
The character encounters Hugin the raven, who provides world lore and guidance.
The character discovers a runestone indicating the location of the first boss, Eikthyr.
The character crafts a wooden club.
The character kills a boar and collects leather scraps.
Flint is gathered along the water's edge.
The character crafts a stone axe.
The character reaches the sacrificial altar for the boss Eikthyr.
The character crafts a hammer, unlocking the ability to build structures.
A campfire is constructed to provide warmth and deter enemies.
A workbench is built, unlocking advanced crafting recipes.
Construction begins on a basic wooden shelter.
A bed is built and claimed, setting the character's spawn point.
The character sleeps through the first night.
The character gains the 'Rested' buff, improving health and stamina regeneration.
